metadata.source: Synthesis of GitHub audit, docs audit, Dev Community (2,161 chunks), Self-hosted bridges (10,911 chunks)

signals.title: AgentRemote: AI Agent Platform Pivot
signals.summary: Beeper is building a platform to host AI agents inside chat conversations. Originally named 'ai-bridge', renamed to 'agentremote' in early 2026.
evidence: github.com/beeper/agentremote - 11 stars, daily commits, Go codebase
Subdirectories: bridges/ai, bridges/codex, bridges/openclaw, bridges/opencode
batuhan (Mar 6, 2026): '3 bridges in AI bridge very close to ready for testing'
bridge-manager PR #72 (batuhan): 'Add AI bridge' - OPEN
implications: Beeper evolving from 'all your chats' to 'all your chats AND agents'
Codex, OpenClaw, OpenCode can be accessed through Beeper chat
Full history, live streaming, tool approvals, encrypted delivery
Potential to become the unified interface for AI agent interaction

signals.title: AI Chats: Imminent Feature Launch
signals.summary: Built-in AI chat capability coming to Beeper very soon, with image analysis planned.
evidence: batuhan (Mar 4, 2026): 'Coming very soon' regarding AI Chats
Image forwarding for questions, image descriptions planned
Translations already built but unreleased (~2 months in nightly)
Zero documentation exists for any AI features
implications: Beeper Plus feature tier expansion
Competition with native AI in iMessage, Google Messages
MCP + AI Chats creates powerful local-first AI messaging

signals.title: Headless Desktop: Server-Side Beeper
signals.summary: Beeper is working on a headless/hostable version of Desktop API that doesn't require the GUI app.
evidence: batuhan (Dec 17, 2025): 'Working on headless/hostable Desktop API with decryption and webhooks'
batuhan (Sep 2, 2025): 'We can eventually build a headless version where you can run Beeper Desktop on a server'
Community demand: docker-beeper (56 stars) as workaround
implications: Server deployments without Docker+GUI workaround
Enables real webhooks and background processing
Makes n8n/Zapier/CRM integrations viable
Could be a Beeper Plus/Enterprise feature

signals.title: Webhooks: #1 Community Request
signals.summary: Webhooks are the most requested developer feature, confirmed as planned but no ETA.
evidence: batuhan (Dec 12, 2025): Confirmed webhooks planned, '#1 community request'
WebSocket events (v4.2.557, Feb 2026) as partial substitute but underdocumented
Multiple n8n integration requests in Dev Community
batuhan: 'I'm a heavy user of N8N'
implications: Will likely ship alongside headless mode
Enables real-time CRM, task extraction, notification workflows
WebSocket events may be deprecated once webhooks land

signals.title: Desktop API Ecosystem Maturing Rapidly
signals.summary: 6 official SDKs, OpenAPI spec, 11+ community clients. All auto-generated via Stainless from the OpenAPI spec.
evidence: TypeScript SDK v4.5.0, Python v4.1.296, Go v0.4.0, CLI v0.2.0, PHP, SQL
chat-adapter-matrix v0.2.0 for Vercel Chat SDK
30+ community CLI tools and SDKs
REST /v1 migration from gRPC /v0 complete
implications: Stainless auto-generation means rapid SDK updates
Low barrier for new integrations
SQL SDK hints at database-level integration experiments

signals.title: MCP as Primary Developer Interface
signals.summary: Beeper is positioning MCP as the main way developers interact with chat data, supporting 9 MCP clients.
evidence: Supported clients: Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, Raycast, Windsurf, Warp, Codex, Gemini CLI
Built-in MCP server in Beeper Desktop (Settings > Developers > MCP)
Claude Desktop Extension (.dxt) shipped
mcp-android for Android devices
implications: Every AI-powered IDE can access chat data
MCP becomes the 'AI interface' while REST is the 'developer interface'
Beeper as a data source for AI agents across all coding tools

signals.title: Bridge Bounty Program: Up to $50K
signals.summary: Beeper offers substantial bounties for new bridges: WeChat, Snapchat, Teams, Viber, LINE, dating apps.
evidence: Blog post: blog.beeper.com/2025/10/28/build-a-beeper-bridge/
Max bounty: $50,000
Technology required: Matrix bridgev2 interface in Golang
Contact: kishan@beeper.com
implications: Aggressive expansion of supported networks
WeChat and Teams are highest-value targets
Community bridges can earn significant income

signals.title: Clay.earth Integration Potential
signals.summary: Clay (personal CRM) is under the Automattic roof alongside Beeper. Integration hinted but no ETA.
evidence: batuhan (Sep 6, 2025): 'We are under the same roof, integrations will come, no ETA'
clay.earth already ingests messaging data
Automattic portfolio synergy opportunity
implications: Beeper + Clay = messaging-aware CRM
Could be killer feature for sales/relationship management
Automattic has WordPress, Tumblr, Clay, Beeper, Pocket Casts under one roof

signals.title: Vercel Chat SDK Adapters
signals.summary: Beeper is building adapters for Vercel's Chat SDK, enabling bot/integration development using modern AI frameworks.
evidence: chat-adapter-matrix (12 stars, v0.2.0, TypeScript)
desktop-api-chat-adapter (0 stars, TypeScript)
Works with ALL bridged networks
implications: Developers can build Beeper bots using Vercel AI SDK patterns
Bridges the gap between AI frameworks and chat platforms
Potential for ecosystem of Chat SDK-based Beeper integrations
